title: Fix iframe to fill full screen on mobile

requirements.text: Ensure the embedded iframe fills the entire screen on mobile devices. The root app container, all wrapper elements, and the iframe itself must expand to cover 100% of the visible viewport with no gaps, scrollbars, or unused whitespace. Use CSS techniques such as `position: fixed`, `width: 100vw`, `height: 100vh` (with `100dvh` as a fallback for dynamic viewport), `inset: 0`, and `overflow: hidden` on the html/body and all container elements to eliminate any small or constrained window appearance. The branded bar must remain visible but must not reduce the iframe's height — use absolute or fixed positioning for the bar overlaid on the iframe so the iframe still occupies the full viewport behind it.

quotes: It only shows a small environment window. I need it to be full screen.

acceptanceCriteria: On a mobile device (iOS and Android), the iframe fills the entire screen edge-to-edge with no visible gaps or blank areas.
The html, body, and all wrapper/container elements have no default margin, padding, or height restrictions that would constrain the iframe.
The iframe uses position: fixed and covers 100vw × 100dvh (or 100vh fallback), starting from inset: 0.
The branded bar is overlaid on top of the iframe without reducing the iframe's height.
No horizontal or vertical scrollbars appear outside the iframe on the host page.
The layout works correctly on iPhone (with notch/dynamic island) and Android devices.

constraints: Do not remove or hide the branded bar — it must remain visible overlaid on top of the iframe.
Do not change the embedded URL: https://t3knologic.github.io/revelation-walls-gallery/
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme or brand colors.
Adding new features or content beyond fixing the full-screen layout.
